sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68682" key="monotri/glufos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-τρίγλῠφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68682.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with single triglyphs</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vitr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.3.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
